titleStmt.title: SII 24.55: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 55. (A.R. No. 3 of 1948-49.) III PRĀKĀRA, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Records assignment of two plots of land free of specified taxes by the temple executives to Sēnāpatigaḷ Taḷiyil Madurāntakaṉ Rājēndrachōḻak-Kiḍāra tarayar and his wife Rājakēsarivalli for raising two flower gardens in their names. Mentions among the boundaries the Rājēndrachōḻa-vāṇādhirāja maṇṇilai. The record is dated in the 13th regnal year of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻ cūḻnta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻnta puviyil ponnemiyaḷavun tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattu cakkara koṭṭattu vikkiramattoḻi lāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvarai yiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāriayir muṉaik koṉtaḷavaracar tantaḷa miriya vāḷurai kaḻittut toḷvalikāṭṭi porparinaṭāttik kīrttiyai niṟu
tti vaṭaticai vākai cūṭit teṉṟicai temaru kamalap pūmakaḷ potumaiyum poṉni yāṭai naṉnilappāvaiyin taṉimaiyun tavirttu punitaṟ tirumaṇimakuṭam Urimaiyiṟ cūṭit taṉnaṭi Iraṇṭun taṭamuṭiyākat tolnila ventar cūṭa muṉṉāḷ maṉuvāṟu perukak kaliyāṟu vaṟuppac ceṅkol ticai toṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai Irunilavaḷā
kam Eṅkaṇun tantu tiruniḻal veṇṇilāt tikaḻa Orutani meruvil puliviḷaiyāṭa vāḻ kaṭaṟ ṟivāntarattup pūpālar tiṟai viṭu tanta kalañcori kaḷiṟu muṟai niṟpa vilaṅku piṟ kulap piṟaipol niṟpiḻai yeṉṉum colletirkoṭiṟṟallatu tankai villetir ko(ṭa)ṭā vikkalaṉ kala ta naṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭu veṉat tuṅkapattirai Aḷavum Eṅka
ṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟum viṭṭa tan mānamum kūṟina viramum kiṭappa Ēṟiṉa malaikaḷu mutuku neḷippa viḻunta natikaḷum cuḻanṟuṭaintoṭa viḻunta kaṭalkaḷun talai virittalamara kuṭaticait taṉṉāṭukantu tāṉun tāṉaiyum paṉnāḷiṭṭa pala pala mutukum payantetir māṟina jayapperuntiruvum paḻiyukantu kuṭutta pukaḻin cel viyum vāḷeri roṇkaṇ maṭantai
yiṭṭamum miḷātu kuṭutta veṅkari niraiyum kaṅkamaṇṭalamum ciṅkaḷameṉṉum pāṇiyiraṇṭum Oru vicaik kaikkoṇṭiṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭimaṇṭalamuṅ koḷḷat tiruvuḷḷattaṭaittu veḷḷavaru parittaraṅkamum poruparikkalaṅkaḷum poru karittaraṅkamum tantiravāriyumuṭaittāy vantu vaṭakaṭal tenkaṭal paṭarvatu polat tanperuñceṉai yevi pañcavaraiyvarum
poruta porkkaḷattañci veru neḷittoṭi Araṇena(ṇa)ppukka kāṭaṟattuṭaittu nāṭaṭippaṭuttu maṟṟavar tammai vaṉacararākki pocca veñcura meṟṟi koṟṟavil niṟutti muttin kalāpa muttamiṭpotiyamu mattaveṅkaripaṭuma yyaṟcayyamumṅ kaṉniyuṅ kaiyk koṇṭaruḷit teṉṉāṭṭellai kāṭṭi kuṭamalai nāṭṭetirnta cāve
ṟellām tani vicumpeṟa māveṟiya tanvarutaniṟṟalaivaraik kuṟukalarkulaiyak koṭṭāṟuṭpaṭa neṟi toṟu nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷit tiṟai koḷalai talaṅkaḷum poliya viramum tiyākamum viḷaṅkap pārmicai mevalar vaṇaṅka vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakesaripanumarāṉa cakkaravarttikaḷ kulottuṅkacoḻa de
varkku yāṇṭu 13 Āvatu Āḻvār tiruvaraṅkatevaṟku śrī kāriyañceykiṟa naṭu virukkum karippuṟattana yam rājāḻriyaca tiruvaraṅkamāḷi tiruppaṇi ceyyum tirunāṭuṭai nampiyum śrī toṇṭaraṭippoṭidāsarum .
ni timaṅkalattu vaṭamaturaip piṟantā nampiyum Uḷḷiṭṭa Aṟuvarum śrīpaṇṭāravāriyam Āritan tiruvāykkula muṭaiyān cirākavanum Āritan kurukai kāvalan Uḷḷiṭṭa Aṟu nātanārāyaṇanu kkaṇakku vempūruṭaiyānāna Āḻ
piriyanum Uḷḷiṭṭa Ivvaṉaivom senāpatikaḷ taḷiyil maturān=takan Āna rājentracoḻakkiṭārattaraiyarkku Ivar peṇṭāṭṭi rājakecarivallikkum na muṅkiṟkuṭiyile maṇaliṭāy nūṟṟuccamvaṟcaram payir ceyya nilattukku kiḻ pāṟkellai
yum vāykkāl talaikku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai rājentracoḻa mahā- balivāṇāyirājar maṇṇilaikku vaṭakkum meṟpāl kellai Eḻupatteṭṭu nāṭan nantavānattuk kiḻ ve kku vaṭakkum vaṭapāṟkellai malai kalattu nīrpā kkut teṟkum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam Onṟaraiya
maturāntaka viḷākam Enṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilam mukkālum malli viḷākam Enṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilam mukkālum Āka nilam Onṟaraiyum tirutti tān veṇṭu payir ceytu viḷainta nilattāl marakkālāl Eṇkalamāka pannirukala nellu Āḻvār śrī paṇṭārattil Aḷakkakaṭavānā kavum Innilattukku nellu pokki suvāmi pokattu mikuti koṇ
ṭu Āḷḷonṟu nellu nittam kuṟuṇiyāka Āḷḷiraṇṭukku nellup patakku piṭavaimutalk kācu nālum Āka maturāntakat tirunantavānamu mallitiruna ntavāṉamu ceyyum Ā(ḷ)ḷiraṇṭukku nellup patakkum piṭa vaḻutalakka nellu tūṇiyum koṇṭu Ittirunantavanam ccevvittu Anupavikkak kaṭavānākavum Itu vallatu tiruvācal ponta veṭṭi muṭṭaiyāṉa ceyyakkaṭavi talla
verikkulaiyum cennir veṭṭiyum ceyyakkaṭavitākavum Ippaṭikku santirātittavar nikkakkaṭavitākavum Aṭuttuk kuṭuttom senāpati taḷiyil maturāntakanāna Irājentracoḻakiṭārattaraiyarkku varpe Āḻvār kanmikaḷom Ivai śrīvaiṣṇavāri ṭaraiyānnāna Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷappiriyan Eḻuttu koyil kaṇakku Anantanārāyaṇa (nārāyaṇa)na Eḻuttu Ipparicu Aṟi
n śrīvaiṣṇavāriyam toṇṭaraṭidāsanen Ivai Enneḻuttu Ivai tirunāṭuṭaiyān sayiññai Ippaṭi Aṟiven mārakkamaṅkalattu Arikulavāraṇanampi sayiññai Ippaṭikku vaṅkippuṟa Ippaṭi Aṟiven Irāja(r)ā śrariya caruppe tu tiruvaraṅkadāsan Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven pāratāyan Ārāvamutin Eḻuttu Itu Āritan kurukai kāvalan Ārāvamutin
[sayi]ññai Ippaṭi Aṟiven Āritan tiruvāykkulamuṭaiyān śrīrākavan Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven Āritan tiruiḷañciṅkam Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kecuvan Aṟivariyā sayiññai Ippaṭikku perumpuliyūr AnantaIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 24.55 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
